optimizer_switches.name: semijoin
optimizer_switches.explanation: IN / EXISTS subqueries are rewritten into a semi-join with the outer query and then resolved via one of the semijoin strategies (firstmatch, loosescan, duplicateweedout, or materialization).

optimizer_switches.name: duplicateweedout
optimizer_switches.explanation: Semijoin strategy: runs the subquery as a normal inner join and then removes duplicate outer rows using a temporary table keyed on their row IDs.

suggestions.action: Add indexes on filter/join columns to avoid full table scans

executive_summary: Query scans 1 table; examines ~1,001 rows to return 1. Main finding: no index covers (y, x) on t2.

index_suggestions.ddl: CREATE INDEX idx_t2_y_x ON t2 (y, x);
index_suggestions.reason: Full scan on t2 with filter on (y, x)
